sections.description: Pure utility functions and constants for formatting, colors, and heatmap computation.
sections.purpose: Provide stateless, reusable helpers used across components and composables. All functions are pure with no side effects, making them easy to test.
strengths: All functions are pure and stateless — easy to test and reason about
Color constants use 'as const' for literal type narrowing
computeLevels uses percentile-based adaptive thresholds rather than fixed cutoffs
weaknesses: fmtNum uses fixed thresholds (1e3/1e6/1e9) without locale-aware formatting for the integer case
sections.test_coverage: format.ts: 11 tests (fmtNum, fmtCost, fmtDuration). heatmap.ts: 4 tests (computeLevels). colors.ts: no tests (constants only).
dependencies: None — pure TypeScript with no imports
sections.functionality:
- format.ts: fmtNum (K/M/B suffixes), fmtCost ($ with adaptive decimal places), fmtDuration (s/m/h)
- colors.ts: COLORS (token types), MODEL_COLORS, LANG_COLORS, LOC_COLORS, ACTIVITY_COLORS, HEATMAP_LEVELS constants
- heatmap.ts: computeLevels (percentile-based 0-4 level function), DAY_NAMES, MONTH_NAMES constants
sections.files:
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| format.ts | Number, cost, and duration formatting functions |
| colors.ts | Color palette constants for charts and heatmaps |
| heatmap.ts | Heatmap level computation and day/month name constants |
